description_long: This is a small, modern house with a simple rectangular footprint, situated on a triangular green plot. The house features a flat roof and a clean, minimalist facade with a few small, square windows distributed asymmetrically on its visible sides. The exterior appears to be finished in a light, neutral color, likely white or light gray, giving it a contemporary look. The structure is compact, with a single story and no visible decorative elements or porches. The windows are modest in size and do not dominate the facade, suggesting a focus on privacy. The entryway is subtle and blends into the overall geometric simplicity of the building.
description: A compact, modern single-story house with a flat roof, light exterior, and small square windows, set on a triangular green plot.
description_view_0: The house is seen from a corner angle, showing two sides with small square windows and the flat roof clearly visible.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the longer facade with a single window and the flat roof, emphasizing the house's rectangular shape.
description_view_2: A rear corner view reveals the back and side of the house, with minimal window openings and a clean, uninterrupted wall surface.
description_view_3: A direct view of the front facade, showing the main entryway and a couple of small windows, with the flat roof prominent.
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entryway with a flush door and no visible porch or decorative elements
